title: Check for Even and Divisibility by 5

content.problemStatement:
Write a C program that takes an integer as input and checks if the number is both **even** and **divisible by 5**. If the number meets both conditions, the program should print `"Even and Divisible by 5"`. Otherwise, it should print `"Not Even or Not Divisible by 5"`.

You should use logical operators in your program to combine the conditions for checking evenness and divisibility by 5.
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each of the next T lines contains a single integer N.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print "Even and Divisible by 5" if N is both even and divisible by 5, otherwise print "Not Even or Not Divisible by 5". Each answer is printed on its own line.

sampleTestCases.output:
Even and Divisible by 5
Not Even or Not Divisible by 5
Even and Divisible by 5
sampleTestCases.explanation: 10 and 20 are both even and multiples of 5, so they produce the success message. 11 is odd, so it produces the failure message.

sampleTestCases.output:
Even and Divisible by 5
Not Even or Not Divisible by 5
sampleTestCases.explanation: 0 is even and 0%5==0, satisfying both conditions. -5 is divisible by 5 but odd, so it fails.

sampleTestCases.output:
Even and Divisible by 5
Not Even or Not Divisible by 5
Not Even or Not Divisible by 5
Not Even or Not Divisible by 5
sampleTestCases.explanation: -1000000 is even and a multiple of 5. 7 is odd. 14 is even but not a multiple of 5. 25 is a multiple of 5 but odd.

hidden.label: maximum boundary
hidden.expectedOutput:
Even and Divisible by 5
Not Even or Not Divisible by 5
Even and Divisible by 5
Not Even or Not Divisible by 5
Even and Divisible by 5

hidden.label: uniform/edge case
hidden.expectedOutput:
Even and Divisible by 5
Even and Divisible by 5
Even and Divisible by 5
Even and Divisible by 5

hidden.label: tricky case
hidden.expectedOutput:
Not Even or Not Divisible by 5
Not Even or Not Divisible by 5
Even and Divisible by 5
Not Even or Not Divisible by 5

hidden.label: stress/general
hidden.expectedOutput:
Not Even or Not Divisible by 5
Not Even or Not Divisible by 5
Even and Divisible by 5
Not Even or Not Divisible by 5
Even and Divisible by 5
Not Even or Not Divisible by 5
Even and Divisible by 5

solution.approach: The condition "even and divisible by 5" can be checked using the modulo operator. For a number N, N%2==0 tests evenness and N%5==0 tests divisibility by 5. Both conditions must hold simultaneously, so we combine them with the logical AND operator. We read T test cases, evaluate the condition for each N, and output the corresponding message. The algorithm is O(T) time and O(1) extra space.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) – each test case is processed in constant time.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few variables are used regardless of T.
